top_signals.title: Iran says it closed Strait of Hormuz after Israel and Hizbollah exchange fire
top_signals.summary: Set-back comes as US vice-president heads to Switzerland for peace talks with negotiators from the Islamic republic
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
top_signals.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapses: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
top_signals.summary: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
top_signals.summary: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
